messages.author: swarm
messages.text:
What it is: Dynamic routing, final slice: MEASURE whether parking roles actually saves money
What it solves: WHAT THE EPIC BUILT, AND WHAT IT NEVER CHECKED. The dynamic-routing epic (BL-307 auto-hibernate,
BL-317 routing manifest, BL-318 quiet-period gate, BL-324 per-role park/unpark) exists for ONE
reason: TO SAVE MONEY by not running roles a ticket does not need. Every slice of it has landed.
How it works: The cost of bringing a parked role back is measured from a real unpark

messages.author: swarm
messages.text: BL-343 - Dynamic routing, final slice: MEASURE whether parking roles actually saves money is complete.
